urdu transliteration text:
Tujhe jhula jhulaoon
--
english translation text: Please recite a Surah Fateha for the Marhumeen of all who made this translation possible

urdu transliteration text: Tujhe jhula jhulaoon, mai tujhe jhula jhulaoon
english translation text: I rock your cradle, I rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text: Mai khwaab me asghar tujhe Lori bhi sunaoo
english translation text: Asghar, I sing a lullaby to you in my dreams, too

urdu transliteration text: Laut aao safar se ke badi der hui hai
english translation text:
Return from your journey, for you been gone too long
betaab hu kabse tujhe seene se lagaooI'm restless for a while (x2) to wrap you in my embrace

urdu transliteration text: Tujhe jhula jhulaoon, mai tujhe jhula jhulaoon
english translation text: I rock your cradle, I rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text: Koi mujhe batlata nahi teri nishani
english translation text:
No one gives me any directions, how to find you
Barsaat me teero ki Kaha dhundhne jaooIn the shower of arrows how do I come out in search of you

urdu transliteration text: Tujhe jhula jhulaoon, mai tujhe jhula jhulaoon
english translation text: I rock your cradle, I rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Socha tha teri saalgira ghar me karungi
Taqdeer ye kehti hai Tera sog manaooBut fate dictates of mourning your sorrow, instead
english translation text: I had thought of celebrating your birthday at home (in Madina)

urdu transliteration text: Tujhe jhula jhulaoon, mai tujhe jhula jhulaoon
english translation text: I rock your cradle, I rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text: Mai khwaab me asghar tujhe Lori bhi sunaoo
english translation text: Asghar, I sing a lullaby to you in my dreams, too

urdu transliteration text: Tujhe jhula jhulaoon, mai tujhe jhula jhulaoon
english translation text: I rock your cradle, I rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Baba se tere tera janaza na uthega
Rukja zara abbas ko Darya se bulaooHold on, let me call Abbas from the riverbanks
english translation text: Your father will be unable to carry your deceased body

urdu transliteration text: Tujhe jhula jhulaoon, mai tujhe jhula jhulaoon
english translation text: I rock your cradle, I rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Ye khoon bhara kurta ye matti me bhare baal
These blood stained clothes and dusty hair
english translation text: Seene me chupau ke Mai aankho se lagaooShould I bury (the sorrow, with them) in my chest, or wipe my tears with them

urdu transliteration text: Tujhe jhula jhulaoon, mai tujhe jhula jhulaoon
english translation text: I rock your cradle, I rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Is tarha koi rooth ke maa se nahi jaata
Tu khud hi bata de mai tujhe kaise manaoo
english translation text:
No one estranges from their mother like this
You tell me yourself how do I mourn you

urdu transliteration text: Tujhe jhula jhulaoon, mai tujhe jhula jhulaoon
english translation text: I rock your cradle, I rock your cradle

urdu transliteration text:
Rehan ke nauhe pe sada bano ki aai
Bano (Asghar's mother) wailed when she heard Rehan (poet's) eulogy
Mai aankho se ashko ke Samandar ko bahaoo
english translation text: I shed oceans of tears from my eyes (in mourning Asghar)

english translation text: I rock your cradle, I rock your cradle

english translation text: Asghar, I sing a lullaby to you in my dreams, too
